creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Maintainer of deskutils/remind,

A security issue has been publically reported against this port.

References:
http://lists.roaringpenguin.com/pipermail/remind-fans/2015/003172.html

"* Version 3.1 Patch 15 - 2015-07-27
BUG FIX: Fix a buffer overflow found by Alexander Keller"

http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2015/08/07/1

"> var.c
 > DumpSysVar
 > +    if (name && strlen(name) > VAR_NAME_LEN) {
 > +	fprintf(ErrFp, "$%s: Name too long\n", name);
 > +	return;
 Use CVE-2015-5957."
